questions.question: Can you explain your approach to building advanced SQL queries for data analysis in your current role at FirstKey Homes? (difficulty: medium, context: SQL, Follow-up: Can you describe a specific instance where optimizing an SQL query improved performance?)

Describe your experience with using DAX functions in Power BI for complex data analysis. Can you provide an example of a trade-off you made when implementing these functions? (difficulty: hard, context: DAX)

Describe your experience with building data pipelines using Azure Factory and Data Lake. Can you provide an example of a situation where you had to handle data integration issues? (difficulty: medium, context: Azure Data Integration)

Can you explain your approach to debugging Python scripts in PyCharm? Can you provide an example of a challenging bug you encountered and how you identified and resolved it? (difficulty: medium, context: Python, Follow-up: How would you recommend others to handle similar issues?)

Can you discuss your experience with using GitHub for managing code repositories and collaborating with a team? Can you provide an example of a best practice that you've implemented to ensure effective collaboration among team members? (difficulty: easy, context: GitHub)

During your time as Manager, Analytics at FirstKey Homes, you mentioned mentoring team members to enhance their technical reporting capabilities. Can you describe a specific instance where you provided guidance that significantly improved a team member's work? (difficulty: medium, context: Mentorship)

In your Senior Analyst role at FirstKey Homes, you collaborated with cross-departmental teams to build Ad-Hoc Excel reports and Power BI dashboards. Can you describe a situation where collaboration was challenging and how you overcame it? (difficulty: medium, context: Cross-functional Collaboration)

'You identified business trends and seasonal patterns to optimize model parameters and guide strategic decision making through actionable insights' - From your experience at FirstKey Homes. Can you describe a specific instance where this approach led to significant improvements? (difficulty: medium, context: Business Impact)

'You established a comprehensive data framework for revenue management, laying the groundwork for advanced analytics and reporting.' From your experience at FirstKey Homes. Can you describe how this framework improved the efficiency of reporting? (difficulty: medium, context: Data Framework)

Imagine you are tasked with integrating data from a new source system into an existing Azure Data Warehouse pipeline. What steps would you take to ensure minimal impact on the overall performance of the data pipeline? (difficulty: medium, context: Data Integration)
Imagine you are working on a Python script in PyCharm and encounter an unexpected bug. What steps would you take to isolate the issue and devise a solution? (difficulty: medium, context: Debugging)

'You managed weekly pricing rent growth and acquisition meetings to analyze rent growth by market.' Can you describe a situation where your data analysis led to a significant change in strategy or tactics? (difficulty: medium, context: Data-Driven Strategy)

As a Manager, can you describe your approach to managing and developing a team in the analytics domain? What techniques do you find most effective for fostering a collaborative environment? (difficulty: medium, context: Team Management)

'You identified and rectified critical data discrepancies and gaps to ensure the integrity and reliability of reporting.' As a data professional in a managerial role, how do you prioritize and address data quality issues? (difficulty: medium, context: Data Quality)

'You conducted a thorough analysis of Core database systems.' As a manager in the analytics domain, how do you ensure that your team's work is compliant with data privacy regulations? (difficulty: medium, context: Data Privacy)
